SEARCH
Package com.hotelreservation.user.service

Class UserService

java.lang.Object
com.hotelreservation.user.service.UserService
@Service public class UserService extends Object
Service layer for user profile management business logic.

Provides operations for viewing and updating user profiles, and listing all users for admin purposes. This service shares the same database (hotel_auth_db) as the Auth Service to read the user records created during registration, while remaining a separate deployable unit.

Security constraints:

  • Users may only view and update their own profile.
  • Only admins can retrieve the full list of users.
  • Username, password, and roles are intentionally excluded from the updatable fields.

  • Constructor Details

    • UserService

      public UserService(UserRepository userRepository, org.modelmapper.ModelMapper modelMapper)
      Constructs the service with the required repository and mapper.
      Parameters:
      userRepository - JPA repository for user data access
      modelMapper - ModelMapper for converting User entities to UserDTO

  • Method Details

    • getProfile

      public UserDTO getProfile(String username)
      Retrieves the profile of the authenticated user.
      Parameters:
      username - the username of the authenticated caller (forwarded by the API Gateway)
      Returns:
      the user's profile as a UserDTO
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if no user with the given username exists

    • updateProfile

      @Transactional public UserDTO updateProfile(String username, UserDTO userDTO)
      Updates the mutable profile fields of the authenticated user.

      Only phoneNumber may be changed through this endpoint. Username, password, and roles are intentionally protected from modification here, following the principle of least privilege.

      If the email is being changed, it is validated against all existing accounts to prevent duplicate email addresses.

      Parameters:
      username - the username of the authenticated caller
      userDTO - the updated profile data from the request body
      Returns:
      the updated user profile as a UserDTO
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if the user is not found
      APIException - with 400 BAD_REQUEST if the new email is already in use

    • getAllUsers

      public List<UserDTO> getAllUsers()
      Retrieves all registered users in the system. Intended for admin access only.
      Returns:
      list of all user profiles as UserDTO; empty list if none exist
